title: 玉京长歌
sourceText: A mythic opera-pop MV about celestial vows, mortal longing, and a final unresolved echo across the heavens.

songSeed.title: 玉京长歌
songSeed.musicStyle: Chinese GuFeng · Feminine lead · mantra chorus
songSeed.musicStructure: Intro breathes, verses expand the world, choruses carry the mantra, bridge lifts into cosmic philosophy, Chorus 3 explodes visually, Chorus 4 intensifies, Outro leaves an echo.
songSeed.videoOutline: Begin in a celestial hall of jade light, descend into mortal memory, let each chorus trigger calligraphy particles and luminous storms, then leave the last frame suspended over a half-open heavenly gate.

sectionPrompts.title: Opening Atmosphere
sectionPrompts.prompt: A jade palace emerges from mist while distant bells and stars flicker awake.

sectionPrompts.title: Theme Arrival
sectionPrompts.prompt: Reveal the celestial heroine beneath moonlit silk banners and drifting dust.

sectionPrompts.title: Background Expansion
sectionPrompts.prompt: Expand into ancient terraces, long rivers, and memory fragments woven into the sky.

sectionPrompts.title: First Invocation
sectionPrompts.prompt: The first mantra erupts with floating calligraphy and bright green particle halos.

sectionPrompts.title: Inner Conflict
sectionPrompts.prompt: Mirror pools and split reflections show doubt, longing, and divine distance.

sectionPrompts.title: World Expansion
sectionPrompts.prompt: Open the frame to mountains, constellations, and ceremonial stairways.

sectionPrompts.title: Memory Seal
sectionPrompts.prompt: Turn the refrain into a mass chant with layered silhouettes and orbiting glyphs.

sectionPrompts.title: Cosmic Turn
sectionPrompts.prompt: Slow into cosmic philosophy with vast star-fields and suspended bodies.

sectionPrompts.title: Visual Burst
sectionPrompts.prompt: Detonate the cssMV particle climax with jade fire, storm light, and rapid cuts.

sectionPrompts.title: Final Lift
sectionPrompts.prompt: Push to the strongest anthem frame with stacked voices, radiant clouds, and rising camera motion.

sectionPrompts.title: Echo Hook
sectionPrompts.prompt: Fade into a half-open gate and one final wave of light that suggests a return.
